---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help improve Loki
title: "[BUG REPORT]"
labels: bug
assignees: BimmerBass

---

## Summary
Briefly describe the bug.

## Affected Area
- [ ] Move generation
- [ ] Board/state handling
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Evaluation
- [ ] UCI/protocol
- [ ] Testing/benchmarking
- [ ] Other:

## Current Behavior
What happens now?

## Expected Behavior
What should happen instead?

## Reproduction
Steps, command, FEN, move sequence, or test case:

## Evidence
Paste relevant output, perft mismatch, engine log, assertion, or stack trace:

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Bug is reproduced by a test or minimal case
- [ ] Root cause is understood
- [ ] Fix is implemented
- [ ] Regression test is added or updated
- [ ] Related correctness risk is considered

## Notes
Links, related issues, or follow-up ideas.
